macro.title: The Iran conflict hasn’t pushed oil and yields higher this week — here’s why
macro.what: Mortgage rates and oil prices haven’t skyrocketed
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: More plaintiffs join Unison HEI class-action lawsuit in Colorado
macro.what: Two plaintiffs have joined a federal class-action lawsuit in Colorado against home equity investment company Unison Agreement Corp
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: NAHB: Input cost inflation reaccelerates, squeezing builder margins
macro.what: Residential construction input costs jumped in May at their fastest pace in more than three years, putting fresh pressure on builder margins and project underwriting just as many builders were counting on cost stability to offset higher mortgage rates
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Record Home Prices, High Mortgage Rates Push Pending Sales Down for Fourth Straight Week
macro.what: High housing costs and economic instability are driving would-be buyers away
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Unaffected, Fed Likely to Hold Rates Steady on Latest Inflation Data

macro.title: This Week’s Inflation and Sentiment Data May Clarify the Fed’s Path
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: With the Strait of Hormuz still closed and fresh off a hot jobs report last week, rates are at risk of climbing further this week if Wednesday’s inflation data comes in above expectations
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Strong Jobs Report Pushes Mortgage Rates Higher, Reopening the Door to Future Fed Hikes
macro.what: Takeaway: Today’s jobs report will lead to higher mortgage rates as it is strong enough to open the door for Fed officials to debate hikes at the next meeting

housing.title: Google expands real estate listing ads to all 50 states
housing.what: Google is expanding enhanced LSAs for home listings to 50 states, showing listing details and routing leads to local agents.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Private listings and the risk of lower home sale prices
housing.what: Op-ed warns private listings can limit buyer reach, weaken price discovery and increase conflicts for agents.
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Opinion: Congress, don’t mock homeownership month: Fix or flush 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act
housing.what: Critics argue that the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act fails to address the root causes of the housing crisis and relies too heavily on demand-side subsidies instead of boosting supply
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Lenders should view UAD 3.6 as a reset opportunity
housing.what: UAD 3.6 is not just a routine back-office update, but a fundamental shift in how appraisal data is structured, delivered and evaluated

housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
